name: Keenbranch
descs:
[Effects apply only to #3, #4 Deployed Identities]

In a Clash, Clash Power +1; Pierce Skills deal +20% damage.

In an unopposed attack, Pierce Skills deal +10% damage.

[Effects apply only to #3, #4, <style="upgradeHighlight">and #5</style> Deployed Identities]

In a Clash, Clash Power +1; Pierce Skills deal +20% damage.

In an unopposed attack, Pierce Skills deal +10% damage.

[Effects apply only to #3, #4, #5, <style="upgradeHighlight">and #6</style> Deployed Identities]

In a Clash, Clash Power +1; Pierce Skills deal <style="upgradeHighlight">+25%</style> damage.

In an unopposed attack, Pierce Skills deal <style="upgradeHighlight">+12.5%</style> damage.
